notes: Vocabulary + methodology for AI Visibility (Phase 11.5 foundation). Platforms are a controlled vocabulary validated on assignment (same pattern as property_context property_types). property_type_synonyms drives the deterministic hallucination-check for property type.

query_methodology.statement: Beacon executes AI Visibility queries by calling AI-platform APIs directly (not by simulating a person using the consumer chat product). API results can differ from what a real user sees in the consumer app, which may use a different model version, system prompt, retrieval, or personalization. Treat all results as directional, from a stated sample size and date, never as an exact visibility percentage.
known_limitations: API responses may differ from the consumer product for the same prompt.
LLM outputs vary by phrasing, session, and model version, so a single query does not generalize.
Only the platforms with an implemented connector can be queried live; others are recognized but not yet executable.
